topic: Humboldt Current cooling and Casablanca freshness
trigger_keywords: vinos del Valle de Casablanca tengan acidez elevada y frescura aromática
rol tiene la corriente de Humboldt en la viticultura chilena
rol juega el Humboldt Current en la viticultura chilena

steps.label: cause
steps.text: The cold Humboldt Current cools the nearby Pacific and supports cool air and fog influence in Casablanca Valley.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Lower growing temperatures slow ripening and reduce respiratory acid loss.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Grapes retain high acidity and fresh aromatic character despite Chile's latitude.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Grapes retain high acidity and fresh aromatic character despite Chile's latitude.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
